description: Carbon-12 atom (lesson fig rt1-1-3-fig-b): packed nucleus of 6 protons (+) and 6 dim neutrons fades in, proton/neutron pings + property callouts, K and L shells draw on, 2+4 electrons pop in with electron callout. Nuclide ¹²₆C + Z/N/A footer always on (reusable for rt1-1-4 isotopes). Bottom-center kept clear for note chip.
